_comment: Shared app catalog for JBTheatreTools. Both the macOS (SwiftUI) and Windows (WinForms) launchers bundle this file and resolve the per-OS/arch asset by exact name. Keep in sync with each tool's release asset names. Platform keys: macos, windows-x64, windows-arm64. macOS assets are .zip bundles containing a .app; Windows assets are self-contained single-file .exe. The `self` object describes JBTheatreTools' own releases, used for the launcher's self-update check. NOTE: NetworkPortMap / ProjectorControl / ShowDashboard / ShowHandbook asset names are PROVISIONAL until each ships its first release — the launcher shows 'No release' until then, and the controller reconciles the exact names at release time.

apps.name: HELO Control
apps.blurb: Control AJA HELO stream / record encoders.

apps.name: Cisco Switch Tools
apps.blurb: Back up & manage Cisco CBS350 / SG switches over SSH.

apps.name: Cisco Brother Labels
apps.blurb: Generate Brother P-touch port labels from Cisco switch configs.

apps.name: Machine Inventory
apps.blurb: Collect hardware / software inventory from show machines.

apps.name: Network Port Map
apps.blurb: Map network switch ports to the devices plugged into them.

apps.name: Projector Control
apps.blurb: Control theatre projectors over PJLink (Panasonic / Epson).

apps.name: Show Dashboard
apps.blurb: Generate a Node-RED show-control dashboard for a production.

apps.name: Show Handbook
apps.blurb: Generate a per-show video handbook document.
